response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning closely with the role's stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalability optimizations, and end-to-end feature development showcases the technical depth and problem-solving skills required. Leadership in open-source projects and workshops further highlights collaboration and mentorship abilities.
strengths: Directly relevant full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React
Proven impact in scalability, AI-agent development, and tooling
concerns: Limited exposure to Kotlin/Java (secondary stack requirement)
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not relevant to this role
No explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) in recent roles
